---
title: Grace Tiwari
last: Tiwari
middle: ''
first: Grace
people_group: gradstudent
education: M.S. | Oregon State University <br> B.S. | Agriculture and Forestry University,
  Nepal
subtitle: Ph.D. Student, Entomology/INTAD
blurb: ''
description: she/her
image: ../_images/_template.jpg
toc: false
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs
  contents: ../../publications/**/*.qmd
  sort: pub_number desc
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: Tiwari, G.
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: ../_images/_template.jpg
  links:
  - icon: envelope
    text: Email
    href: gvt5197@psu.edu
  - icon: github
    text: GitHub
    href: gracetiwari
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: www.linkedin.com/in/gracetiwari
---

<hr>

::: {#about}

{{< meta blurb >}}

## Education

{{< meta education >}}

<br>
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
